title: Java Thread Priority Hierarchy
description: A visual representation of the pre-defined Java thread priority constants and their relationship to the underlying operating system's native priority scale.
relationships: MIN_PRIORITY is the lowest schedulable priority
NORM_PRIORITY is the default priority assigned to the main thread
MAX_PRIORITY is the highest schedulable priority
JVM maps its 1-10 priorities to the OS's native priority scale
Higher priority threads are given preferential scheduling but not guaranteed execution order
